query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A bright lamp rests on a surface behind intersecting grass blades and plant stems. The left portion of the frame is dominated by an intense glowing light source, while the background and surrounding areas are plunged into deep shadow. The vegetation creates thin linear forms that partially cover the lamp, extending across the image against the dark backdrop.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A bright lamp rests on a surface behind intersecting grass blades, captured with a tilted composition where the light source and vegetation are obstructed and cut off by the frame edges. The image carries a heavy sepia-yellow sickly cast and visible analog film grain throughout. Extreme overexposure blows out the lamp into a blinding white mass that obliterates surface detail, while deep shadows swallow the background, creating harsh tonal extremes and a lo-fi aesthetic.
